get_weather.name: get_weather
get_weather.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location.
get_weather.author: miniClaw

arxiv-search.name: arxiv-search
arxiv-search.description: Search and retrieve academic papers from arXiv.org by query, author, or ID. Use when user asks to find research papers, search academic literature, or get paper information from arXiv.
arxiv-search.author: miniClaw

find-skill.name: find-skill
find-skill.description: Search and install skills from external sources like GitHub, clawhub, and other skill repositories. Use when user asks to find, download, or install new skills from the internet.
find-skill.author: miniClaw

github.name: github
github.description: GitHub operations via `gh` CLI: issues, PRs, CI runs, code review, API queries. Use for checking PR status, creating issues, listing PRs, viewing CI logs.
github.author: miniClaw

skill_validator.name: skill_validator
skill_validator.description: Validate skill files before use. Use when: loading new skills, verifying skill integrity, checking skill metadata. Checks for: required fields, valid syntax, security issues.
skill_validator.author: miniClaw

skill-creator.name: skill-creator
skill-creator.description: Create or update skills. Use when designing, structuring, validating, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.
skill-creator.author: miniClaw
